title: Deal Dispatch: TD Bank To Sell Charles Schwab Stake? Eyenovia, Smart Share Hit Auction Block
author: Anthony Noto
description: TD Bank is considering selling its 10.1% stake in Charles Schwab as part of a strategic review. Eyenovia hired an investment bank to explore a reverse merger or sale, while Smart Share Global and Modernizing Medicine are also considering buyout offers. Several companies, including true Religion and Calpine, have been involved in mergers and acquisitions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Constellation Energy received a $30-billion offer from Calpine, marking a significant pivot for the company as it expands its gas-fired portfolio.
Walt Disney and Fubo TV have agreed to merge their live TV streaming businesses, with Disney taking a 70% ownership stake in the combined entity.
Smart Share Global is considering buyout offers, with Trustar Capital offering to take the company private at a 74.8% premium.
Eyenovia hired an investment bank to explore a reverse merger or sale, as the company aims to conserve cash while continuing to develop its Gen-2 Optejet device.
Walt Disney and Fubo TV have agreed to merge their live TV streaming businesses, with the combined entity becoming the second-largest live TV streamer in North America.
Goodyear Tire & Rubber entered a deal to sell its Dunlop brand to Sumitomo Rubber Industries for around $701 million.
KKR is extending its offer period to FUJI SOFT shareholders, seemingly hoping to outlast Bain Capital's aggressive courtship.
KKR is extending its offer period to FUJI SOFT shareholders, seemingly hoping to outlast Bain Capital's aggressive courtship.
Paychex is acquiring Paycor HCM in an all-cash deal valued at $4.1 billion, offering a 19% premium over Paycor's recent trading average.
Paychex is acquiring Paycor HCM in an all-cash deal valued at $4.1 billion, offering a 19% premium over Paycor's recent trading average.
TD Bank is considering selling its 10.1% stake in Charles Schwab as part of a strategic review stemming from the Canadian bank's U.S. money-laundering scandal.

title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of the Following Investigations: Paycor HCM, Inc. (Nasdaq - PYCR), Shutterstock, Inc. (NYSE - SSTK), Universal Stainless & Alloy Products, Inc. (Nasdaq - USAP), EnLink Midstream, LLC (NYSE – ENLC)
author: N/A
description: Brodsky & Smith is investigating several companies regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by their boards in relation to proposed acquisition deals, including Paycor HCM, Shutterstock, Universal Stainless & Alloy Products, and EnLink Midstream.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The investigation concerns whether the Paycor Board breached its fiduciary duties to shareholders by failing to conduct a fair process and whether the shareholders are receiving fair value for their shares.

The investigation concerns whether the Shutterstock Board breached its fiduciary duties to shareholders by failing to conduct a fair process, including the dilution of the Company's shareholders in the combined company.

The investigation concerns whether the Universal Board breached its fiduciary duties to shareholders by failing to conduct a fair process and whether the deal offers fair value to the Company's shareholders.

The investigation concerns whether the EnLink Board breached its fiduciary duties to shareholders by failing to conduct a fair process and whether ONEOK is paying fair value to shareholders of the Company.

title: Paychex Snaps Up Paycor: $4.1 Billion Deal To Strengthen AI-Driven HR Solutions
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Paychex, Inc. has announced a $4.1 billion deal to acquire Paycor HCM, Inc. The acquisition is expected to enhance Paychex's AI-driven HR technology and expand its upmarket capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights that the acquisition is expected to enhance Paychex's AI-driven HR technology and expand its upmarket capabilities, which suggests the deal will be beneficial for the company.
Paychex is acquiring Paycor HCM for $4.1 billion, which indicates that Paychex sees value in Paycor's offerings and believes the acquisition will strengthen its position in the HR solutions market.
The article mentions that investors can gain exposure to Paychex through this ETF, but does not provide any specific information about the ETF's performance or investment strategy.

title: Robbins LLP Informs Paycor HCM, Inc. Stockholders that it is Investigating the Officers and Directors of PYCR to Determine if They Breached Fiduciary Duties Owed to Shareholders
author: N/A
description: Shareholder rights law firm Robbins LLP is investigating Paycor HCM, Inc. (PYCR) to determine if the company's officers and directors violated securities laws and breached fiduciary duties to shareholders.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article indicates that Robbins LLP is investigating Paycor HCM, Inc. to determine if the company's officers and directors breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders, suggesting potential wrongdoing or mismanagement within the company.

title: Paycor HCM Shareholders are Encouraged to Reach Out to Johnson Fistel for More Information About Potentially Recovering Their Losses
author: Johnson Fistel, Llp
description: Shareholder rights law firm Johnson Fistel is investigating whether Paycor HCM, Inc. violated securities laws by misrepresenting or failing to disclose material adverse information to investors, leading to losses that may be recoverable under federal securities laws.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article indicates that Johnson Fistel is investigating whether Paycor HCM violated securities laws by misrepresenting or failing to disclose material adverse information to investors, which led to investor losses. This suggests a negative sentiment towards the company's actions and potential legal issues.
